    CSDC / CECD

    Centre for the Study of Democratic Citizenship

    Centre for the Study of Democratic Citizenship

    The McGill CSDC team studies democratic citizenship, justice and political behaviors. More about our team, research and upcoming events below.

    Our Research View Upcoming Events See Recent News

    Our Research Focus

    At the CSDC, we work on:
